top_signals.title: Japan core inflation softens to over four year low, weakening case for BOJ rate hike
top_signals.summary: Core inflation — which strips out prices of fresh food — was lower than the 1.7% expected by economists polled by Reuters and below the 1.8% reading in March.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
